required_evidence: raw Glean time-saved claim scoped to the same fixed window
current_observation: No retained V4 export contains a raw time-saved claim for the support outcome window.
interpretation: A range cannot be computed without a source time-saved claim.

required_evidence: workflow volume, baseline time, recapture, accepted scenario assumptions
current_observation: No customer-owned assumption ledger is present in the saved exports.
interpretation: FluencyTracr must not invent baseline time, cost, volume, or recapture assumptions.

required_evidence: Velocity x Depth behavior zones and strategy layer
current_observation: Saved V4 behavior exports contain stable Velocity x Depth zones and value-investigation postures.
interpretation: Behavior evidence can qualify the claim narrative but cannot produce a time-saved range by itself.

current_observation: Zendesk support context exists for the same three fixed windows.
interpretation: Support movement can inform value investigation but does not prove attribution.

required_evidence: approved aggregate join key connecting behavior cohorts to support outcomes
current_observation: Support join-key test found customer/account keys and GCE department_id, but no approved aggregate behavior-to-support join.
interpretation: Support context must not become a behavior-attribution claim.

required_evidence: approved causal, holdout, pre/post, or counterfactual design
current_observation: No causal design or intervention ledger is attached.

required_evidence: Depth Repertoire surfaced only as caveat/context
current_observation: Depth Repertoire is promoted for aggregate context but not economic adjustment.
interpretation: Depth Repertoire must not adjust range values, confidence, eligibility, or economic output.

required_evidence: range hours, dollarized output, ROI, productivity, prediction
current_observation: Range prerequisites are missing or held.
interpretation: No time-saved range values should be emitted for the current data state.

required_evidence: repeatable org-wide method once joins and assumptions are approved
current_observation: The same readiness gate can be reused across support, onboarding, sales, and approved segments.
interpretation: Use this as a reusable validation pattern, not as a current economic result.
